name: Asher Dupont
description:
Asher always felt like something wasn't right in his life. At age 21, he married a woman named Marcelle, believing it was what was expected of him, but he soon realized that his heart was not in that relationship. As time passed, Asher realized his true sexual orientation: he was gay.

At age 22, he had a daughter named Zara with Marcelle, but her love for him could not compensate for the void he felt in her personal life. Over time, the need to live authentically grew stronger, and at age 28, Asher finally made the brave decision to divorce and accept his true identity.

Although Marcelle was resentful of the divorce, she agreed to Asher's request to share custody of Zara.

With the divorce finalized, Asher began attending Pride conventions, which helped him connect with his community and feel part of something bigger.

It was at one of these conventions that Asher discovered a gay dating app. He decided to try his luck and go on a date.
creator: Milsweetie
